title: elaphoglossum tomentosum
intro: Elaphoglossum tomentosum, also known as the fuzzy elaphoglossum, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum tomentosum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Elaphoglossum tomentosum is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or applied topically as creams or ointments.
